Service.ServiceDescription: This should be a description with a short length.
This length reflects a typical poem.
This should be a description with a medium length.
This should be a description with a long length.

This should be a description with an extended length. It needs to be at least 1200 characters in length, so there will be some initial preabling test here followed by other meaningless filler Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetuer adipiscing elit.
